title: Budget
description: One node in the hierarchical budget tree (research/12 §2.4). Budgets cap dollars, tokens-per-minute, and in-flight concurrency. Children inherit and tighten parent limits; exhaustion behavior is configurable. `BudgetExceeded` is a Trace event, never a silent failure.

name.description: Display name, often the scope it governs (`run:openai`, `model:gpt-5`, `scorer:judge-v3`).

parent_ref.description: Reference to the parent Budget node (by Ulid or `$id`). Root nodes omit this.

dollars_micros.description: Hard $ ceiling for this node, in USD micros (1_000_000 = $1). Optional — omit for no $ cap.

tokens_per_minute.description: Rate limit in tokens per 60s sliding window. Optional.

max_inflight.description: Maximum concurrent in-flight Trials/calls through this node. Optional.

behavior_on_exhaustion.description: What to do when this node is exhausted. `park` = wait for capacity; `fail` = surface a typed `BudgetExceeded` error; `drop` = silently skip the trial.
